opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 4.3 rating across 112 reviews with no visible owner response pattern detected.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal neglect to prospects and hurt local SEO rankings.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI to auto-draft personalized responses to every new Google review within hours.

opportunities.label: After-Service Follow-Up
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected despite ServiceTitan being present on the site.
opportunities.observation: Post-job silence means no review requests, upsells, or loyalty touchpoints are reaching customers.
opportunities.fix: Automate post-job SMS and email sequences via ServiceTitan to request reviews and offer maintenance plans.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: Seasonal HVAC business in Boise with no email marketing tools detected on the site.
opportunities.observation: Without automated reminders, recurring revenue from tune-ups and filter changes is left on the table.
opportunities.fix: Build AI-triggered seasonal reminder campaigns through ServiceTitan to convert past customers into plan members.
